title: Functional genomics in Spiralia.
author: Martin-Zamora FM Davies BE Donnellan RD Guynes K Martin-Duran JM
content: S-EPMC10658182 PMC10658182 Functional genomics in Spiralia. Our understanding of the mechanisms that modulate gene expression in animals is strongly biased by studying a handful of model species that mainly belong to three groups: Insecta, Nematoda and Vertebrata.
